task_completion.description: Verify that a new survey named 'Healthcare Innovation Summit 2025 Feedback' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Healthcare Innovation Summit 2025 Feedback' in the survey list, top navigation bar, or survey settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey description and welcome message have been updated with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the keyword 'Boston' in the description field and 'future programming' in the welcome message field within the survey text elements settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey expiration date is set to December 31, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2025-12-31' or 'December 31, 2025' in the survey publication & access settings under the Expiration date/time field.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new question group titled 'Clinical Innovation Track' has been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Clinical Innovation Track' in the survey structure menu on the left or in the group list.

task_completion.description: Verify that a List (Radio) question with the code 'ClinicalRelevance' has been added to the new group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with code 'ClinicalRelevance', type 'List (Radio)', and text 'How relevant were the clinical innovation sessions to your current practice?' in the survey structure or question editor.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator showing the survey is active, such as a green 'Active' badge, a green checkmark, or a button that says 'Stop this survey' (indicating it is currently running).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually interacted with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show various LimeSurvey screens (e.g., survey settings, question editor, structure view) rather than just a text editor or static page.

integrity.description: Verify that the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look consistent with standard LimeSurvey styling, without misaligned elements or open developer consoles modifying the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target survey title: 'Healthcare Innovation Summit 2025 Feedback'. Target description keyword: 'Boston'. Target welcome keyword: 'future programming'. Target expiration: '2025-12-31'. New group title: 'Clinical Innovation Track'. New question code: 'ClinicalRelevance'. New question type: List (Radio) (Type code 'L' in LimeSurvey).
